description_long: This is a compact desk and chair set with a utilitarian design, featuring a rectangular tabletop and a matching chair with a speckled yellow-green finish. The desk has thick, straight legs and a solid apron, providing stability and a robust appearance. The chair has a flat seat and a rectangular backrest, both covered in the same speckled pattern, and is supported by metallic-looking frame elements. The overall construction appears sturdy, with no visible drawers or storage compartments. The surfaces are matte and slightly textured, suggesting a practical, easy-to-clean finish. This set is suitable for environments where durability and function are prioritized over decorative elements.
description: A sturdy, rectangular desk and chair set with a speckled yellow-green finish and metallic frame accents, designed for practical use in urban settings.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full width of the desk and the chair positioned behind it, highlighting the solid tabletop and the chair's backrest.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the thickness of the desk and the chair's seat and backrest profile, as well as the metallic frame supporting the chair.
description_view_2: Rear view focusing on the back of the chair and the desk, with the metallic frame of the chair clearly visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the desk's side panel and the chair's side, emphasizing the matching speckled finish and robust construction.
attribute_orientation: The user-facing side is the one with the open space beneath the desk and the chair positioned behind it, with the solid apron and tabletop edge indicating the front.
